description: The main objective of this pipeline is to read in a file and apply thresholding. The pipeline starts by reading in the file, applies a thresholding operation and then outputs the thresholded image.

fa10f88d-dd00-46e5-b411-986047ea231b.name: filaments-skeleton-to-filaments-2d
fa10f88d-dd00-46e5-b411-986047ea231b.description: Applies a simple algorithm that converts a binary skeleton into a filament. This algorithm only supports 2D data and will apply the processing per Z/C/T slice. Please note that by default the Z voxel size is set to zero.

4d5fdf1b-10ee-4ec6-8af4-ba184d6be7db.name: filaments-filter-components-by-properties
4d5fdf1b-10ee-4ec6-8af4-ba184d6be7db.description: Filters filament connected components by various properties
